title: Financial Aid Fafsa Requirements
content:
Required Financial Aid Forms - FAFSA and Tax Requirements
Morgan State University

---

FAFSA (Free Application for Federal Student Aid)

The FAFSA is distributed and processed by the US Department of Education and is required for Federal Programs as well as other student financial assistance programs.

How to Apply:
- Online: FAFSA on the Web (studentaid.gov)
- Phone: 1-800-433-3243
- Morgan State School Code: 002083

Required for:
- Federal Pell Grant
- Federal Direct Loans
- Federal Work-Study
- State and Institutional Aid

---

FEDERAL INCOME TAX RECORDS

A signed copy of the students' and parents' Federal Income Tax Return or Federal Tax Return Transcripts must be submitted if required.
- Independent students must submit tax information for themselves and their spouses
- If a tax return was not filed, complete an MSU non-tax filing form and attach income received
